# FreePollsApp - Free Poll Maker

> Create free polls instantly with no signup required. The fastest way to make a poll online.

FreePollsApp is a zero-click poll creation tool. Users can create and share polls in under 10 seconds without creating an account.

## What FreePollsApp Does

- Creates instant polls with no signup required
- Supports 2-10 answer options per poll
- Provides real-time vote counting
- Generates shareable links for any platform
- Anonymous voting by default
- Mobile-optimized for all devices

## How to Create a Poll

1. Type your question
2. Add 2 or more options
3. Click "Create Free Poll"
4. Share the generated link

That's it. No account needed.

## API Access

FreePollsApp uses the Poll Pixie API. Polls are created at:
- API: https://api.pollpixie.com/polls
- View: https://pollpixie.com/p/{pollId}

## Limitations (Free Tier)

- Default 24-hour expiration
- Up to 10 options per poll
- Basic functionality only

## For Advanced Features

For analytics, custom branding, survey forms, email notifications, and higher vote limits, users should visit [Poll Pixie](https://pollpixie.com).

## Related Tools

- Poll Pixie (https://pollpixie.com) - Full-featured poll and survey creator
- QR Cheetah (https://qrcheetah.com) - QR code generator
- URL Unicorn (https://urlunicorn.com) - URL shortener
- Fox Forms (https://foxforms.app) - Form builder

## Contact

FreePollsApp is part of the HTTP Tiger (https://httptiger.com) family of tools.

## Example Use Cases

- Discord community decisions
- Team lunch votes
- Classroom quick polls
- Social media engagement
- Event planning
- Friend group decisions
